'''Quockra-4''' was a [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|world]], flat without much differentiation of terrain. It never rained and there weren't any [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]], though there were several extremely large salt flats. It would become hot during the midday hours, making it dangerous for unprotected [[Human/Legends|Humans]]. At night the temperature was cold, and protective clothing was required. There was only one [[City/Legends|city]], located near the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]]. It was built largely underground to escape the extremes of temperature. This world was assumed by [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] to be populated entirely by [[Droid/Legends|droids]] of a thousand different varieties. Many of the droids were of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] manufacture, but some were of unknown design.<ref name="GG6" />
